description: Create a complex GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-18.04, macos-10.15, windows-2019), compilers (GCC, Clang, MSVC), and Qt versions. For each job, it checks out the code, installs Qt, sets up the environment, and builds and installs Quaternion and its dependencies.
